title: SERVICE MEMBER FAMILY SUPPORT - 211info
text: ARMED FORCES RESERVE CENTER FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICE MEMBER FAMILY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers navigation assistance in finding child care and child care expense assistance for military families. Programs vary depending on branch of service. 230 Geer Drive Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-4pm Email (800) 424-2246 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 424-2246 Child Care Aware Of America Local Contact (971) 355-3081 Northern Youth Outreach Coordinator Jasmine Studenny [email protected] Local Contact (541) 880-2529 Southern Youth Outreach Coordinator Terri Miller [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email or visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Military Family Service/Support Centers Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Specialized Information and Referral * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
